prompt:
Create a premium avant-garde editorial poster in 4:3 aspect ratio, inspired by modern constructivist graphic design and surreal collage art. The poster features a stylish young male AI artist portrait from the chest up, positioned slightly center-left, with a calm confident expression and raised chin. His face is transformed with abstract cut-paper collage elements: geometric mask shapes around both eyes, a blue circular eye ring, cream rectangular eye frame, red and orange painted face patches, black vertical strips, torn-paper textures, and layered cubist fragments across the cheeks and jaw.

The background is a warm cream textured paper surface with subtle grain. Behind the male character, add a large muted red circular/half-arch graphic shape with faint wavy texture. Use bold black oversized typography as the main design element: huge word “BMX” on the left side, large word “artist” on the right side, and smaller text “the ai” placed between them with a thin red underline. Typography should feel bold, clean, modern, and editorial, similar to a high-end art magazine cover.

Add small minimalist text blocks around the poster:
Top left: “IMAGINE. BREAK. BUILD.”
Top center: “CODE. CREATE. DISRUPT.”
Top right/center: “ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE. HUMAN EXPRESSION.”
Left lower side: “TOOLS CHANGE. VISION EVOLVES. CREATIVITY REMAINS.”
Right lower side: “GENERATED BY ALGORITHM. DIRECTED BY INTENT.”
Use small red starburst/asterisk graphic symbols as decorative accents in the corners and near the typography. The male character wears an artistic fashion outfit: black jacket with painterly splatter texture, red/orange shirt, muted blue and beige painted patches, experimental high-fashion styling. Color palette: cream, black, deep red, muted orange, beige, and small blue accents. Strong negative space, bold hierarchy, clean editorial composition, premium poster design, sharp typography, textured paper finish, surreal creative AI artist identity, no extra random text, no watermark.
Aspect Ratio: 4:3
 Style: premium editorial poster, surreal collage, constructivist graphic design, AI artist branding, bold typography, textured paper, high-fashion male portrait.
